# Techyard Systems

> Techyard Systems is an autonomous-systems practice that designs, builds, and hands off custom AI agents for support, sales, and operations. We work in fixed-fee pilots and short engagements, and the work the agent owns gets handed back to the client with no vendor lock-in.

## What we do

- **Support automation** — tier-1 deflection with CSAT veto conditions, not raw ticket-close rates
- **Sales agents** — inbound qualification, outbound prospecting, follow-up sequences
- **IT & HR request routing** — access requests, onboarding workflows, policy Q&A
- **Data analysis & reporting** — scheduled digests, anomaly surfacing, monitoring agents
- **Operations monitoring** — continuous signal-map evaluation against business systems (TMS, billing, logistics)

## How we work

1. Two-week scoped discovery — we learn the system, measure a baseline, agree on the metric that matters
2. Fixed-fee build, typically 8–10 weeks
3. Handover — client owns the agent, the infrastructure, and the model weights
4. Optional retainer for maintenance and training updates

## Key pages

- [Services](https://techyardsystems.com/services) — the five practice areas, each with typical timeline and measurable-by outcome
- [Work](https://techyardsystems.com/work) — case studies with real outcomes (freight monitoring, support deflection, healthcare intake)
- [Journal](https://techyardsystems.com/journal) — field notes from shipping agents into production
- [Security](https://techyardsystems.com/security) — SOC 2 Type II, GDPR, HIPAA, ISO 27001; plainly-answered FAQs
- [Contact](https://techyardsystems.com/contact) — 15-minute scoping call or a paragraph of context

## Contact

- Email: contactus@techyardsystems.com
- Security disclosures: security@techyardsystems.com
- Based in Canada, working worldwide

## What we don't do

- Training on client data by default (never, unless the engagement explicitly asks for it)
- Vendor lock-in (no proprietary APIs gating the agent you just paid us to build)
- LLM wrappers badged as agents (if it's a chatbot, we'll tell you it's a chatbot)
